resultList.dtldesc: Discover an exceptional living experience in this well-appointed 3 BHK apartment located in the sought-after Sai Akshay Magnus Residency, situated in the thriving area of Alwal, Hyderabad. Property Specifications: This spacious apartment features a well-planned layout with a total area of 1545 sq. ft. Designed to cater to a contemporary lifestyle, the residence includes three generously sized bedrooms and three modern bathrooms. The flat is situated on the 3rd floor and is oriented towards the main road, providing good natural light and ventilation throughout the living spaces. The property is currently available in an unfurnished state, offering residents a blank canvas to design and personalise the interiors according to their specific tastes and requirements. Facilities: The apartment is set within a residential project that provides a range of essential facilities to ensure a hassle-free living experience. The building is designed to provide a secure and comfortable environment, with all necessary utility infrastructure in place to support the daily needs of its occupants. Locality Alwal is a prominent and well-connected locality in Hyderabad, known for its strategic location and strong community infrastructure. The apartment is conveniently situated near key landmarks, being just a two-minute drive from St. Michaels School and approximately 3.5 km from Kompally, offering excellent access to quality education and retail centres. The neighbourhood is well-serviced by established transit points, including the Alwal Hills bus stop and the Alwal railway station, providing seamless connectivity to the rest of the city. Its proximity to major shopping hubs, reputable diagnostic centres, and healthcare facilities makes it a prime destination for those looking for a balanced and accessible urban life.

resultList.dtldesc: This contemporary 3 BHK apartment offers an exceptional living experience within the well-regarded APR Praveens Higheria project in Patancheru. Designed to provide a blend of comfort, modern convenience, and scenic views, this residence is an ideal choice for families looking for a high-quality home in a growing and well-connected part of Hyderabad. Property Specifications: Spanning a super built-up area of 1560 sq. ft, this multi-storey apartment is located on the 2nd floor of a 10-storey building. The layout is intelligently planned to feature three spacious bedrooms and three bathrooms, alongside two balconies that provide refreshing views of the garden, swimming pool, and the main road. The apartment is provided in an unfurnished condition, featuring elegant marble flooring throughout, allowing new residents to design the space to their personal taste. As a new construction, the property offers modern infrastructure and is ready for immediate occupancy, holding a freehold type of ownership. Facilities: The residential complex is equipped with a robust array of amenities designed to facilitate a convenient and active lifestyle. Residents have access to a fully equipped gymnasium, a swimming pool, and a dedicated kids' play area. For social and recreational gatherings, the project includes a banquet hall, a meditation area, and a cafeteria. The community ensures safety and reliability with 24-hour water supply, power backup, CCTV surveillance, and professional security personnel. Additionally, the complex features internet connectivity and guest accommodation, ensuring that all modern needs are well-catered for. The property is situated in Patancheru, a location known for its rapid development and accessibility. It is strategically positioned near key educational institutions such as the Aryan School of Excellence, St Marys Group of Institutions, and Oakdale International School, making it a convenient base for families. Daily necessities are easily met with the Mahendra Shopping Centre located nearby, and the area enjoys good connectivity via the Patancheru Railway Station. The presence of scenic green spaces like Shanthi Nagar Galli Park further enhances the appeal of this neighbourhood, offering a balanced environment that combines urban convenience with residential tranquillity.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover modern high-rise living with this well-designed 3 BHK apartment in Urbanrise On Cloud 33, a landmark residential development in Bachupally, Hyderabad. Combining contemporary design, premium amenities and excellent connectivity, this under-construction home is an ideal choice for families and investors seeking long-term value.Property SpecificationsLocated on the 14th floor of a 33-storey tower, this apartment offers a super built-up area of 1353 sq. ft and a carpet area of 900 sq. ft. The thoughtfully planned layout comprises three bedrooms, two bathrooms and one balcony, providing comfortable living spaces for modern families. A combined living and dining area creates an open and welcoming atmosphere, while the functional kitchen is supported by a piped gas connection. The apartment is offered unfurnished, allowing buyers the freedom to customise the interiors according to their preferences. Elegant marble flooring enhances the overall appeal and durability of the home. Being west-facing and Vastu-compliant, the residence enjoys good natural light and ventilation. The property is available under freehold ownership and is approved by the Greater Hyderabad Municipal Corporation.FacilitiesThe apartment comes with one covered and one open parking space for convenient vehicle accommodation. Residents benefit from 24-hour water supply, full power backup, security services, CCTV surveillance and intercom connectivity, ensuring a safe and comfortable lifestyle. The tower is equipped with three lifts, including service access for smooth movement throughout the building. The apartment overlooks landscaped gardens and community amenities, creating a pleasant living environment. The project offers a wide range of lifestyle facilities, including childrens play areas, a kids pool with water slides and numerous recreational amenities designed for all age groups.LocalitySituated in Bachupally, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to key educational, healthcare and commercial destinations. Located beside Mamata Hospital and Kennedy High School, the apartment provides easy access to essential services and reputed educational institutions. Public transport is readily available, while railway and metro connectivity can be accessed within approximately 5 km. Daily conveniences such as supermarkets, banks and shopping facilities are also located nearby. Developed by Urbanrise, this RERA-approved project offers modern infrastructure and a vibrant community lifestyle. As one of the fastest-growing residential corridors of Hyderabad, Bachupally continues to attract homebuyers due to its strong connectivity and expanding infrastructure. Scheduled for possession in September 2026, this apartment presents an excellent opportunity to own a home in a thriving neighbourhood.
